spec.description: Current and avg. KPI-s. Expects 'get_load_average' and 'backends'  helpers to be installed on the monitored DB.

options.content:
### Brought to you by

[![Cybertec – The PostgreSQL Database Company](https://www.cybertec-postgresql.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/cybertec-logo-white-blue.svg)](https://www.cybertec-postgresql.com/en/)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT max((roll - roll_lag) / ((roll - roll_lag) + (comm - comm_lag))::numeric) * 100 AS tx_rollback_rate
  FROM (
        SELECT(data->>'xact_rollback')::int8 AS roll, 
              lag((data->>'xact_rollback')::int8) OVER w AS roll_lag,
              (data->>'xact_commit')::int8 AS comm, 
              lag((data->>'xact_commit')::int8) OVER w AS comm_lag
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
           AND dbname = '$dbname'
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
     ) x
 WHERE comm > comm_lag OR roll > roll_lag

spec.title: WAL folder size
spec.description: Transaction Log Folder size.  Assumes get_wal_size helper being installed. 1/10 GB Warn / 50  Error  thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  (data->>'wal_size_b')::float8 AS wal_size
FROM
  wal_size
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) 
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT (data->>'active')::int AS active_cnt
FROM backends
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: QPS (avg.)
spec.description: Queries per Second based on  "pg_stat_statements" extension info. < 0.1 Error / < 1 Warning thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg( (c - c_lag) / extract(epoch FROM time - time_lag) ) AS qps
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'calls')::int8 AS c, 
               lag((data->>'calls')::int8) OVER w AS c_lag,
               time, 
               lag(time) OVER w AS time_lag
          FROM stat_statements_calls
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (order by time)        
       ) x
 WHERE c >= c_lag AND time > time_lag

spec.title: Query runtime (avg.)
spec.description: Average query runtime based on "pg_stat_statements"

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg(CASE WHEN c = c_lag THEN 0 ELSE (tt - tt_lag)::numeric / (c - c_lag) END) AS avg_query_runtime
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'total_time')::float8 AS tt, 
               lag((data->>'total_time')::float8) OVER w AS tt_lag,
               (data->>'calls')::int8 AS c, 
               lag((data->>'calls')::int8) OVER w AS c_lag
          FROM stat_statements_calls
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW W AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) x
 WHERE c >= c_lag AND tt >= tt_lag
 ORDER by 1 desc
 LIMIT 1

spec.title: Instance uptime
spec.description: Time from last Postgres process restart.  < 5m Error, < 30m Warn thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'postmaster_uptime_s')::int AS uptime
FROM wal
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: WAL archiving status
spec.description: Based on pg_stat_archiver. N/A when archiving is not enabled.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'is_failing_int')::int AS is_failing
FROM archiver
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: Table changes
spec.description: Number of DDL changes i.e. new or changed tables, columns, functions etc.  >1 Warn thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT count(*)
FROM table_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: Shared buffers hit %
spec.description: Shared buffers is the Postgres-managed  cache. 90%+ is what you normally want to see for good performance.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT ((hit - hit_lag) / ((hit - hit_lag) + (read - read_lag))::numeric) * 100 AS cache_hit_ratio
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'blks_hit')::int8 AS hit, 
               lag((data->>'blks_hit')::int8) OVER w AS hit_lag,
               (data->>'blks_read')::int8 AS read, 
               lag((data->>'blks_read')::int8) OVER w AS read_lag
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) x
 WHERE hit > hit_lag OR read > read_lag
 ORDER by 1

spec.title: Config change events
spec.description: Server configuration changes.  >1 Warn thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT count(*) AS changes_cnt
FROM configuration_changes
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: DATADIR disk space left
spec.description: Assumes get_psutil_disk wrapper being installed. 10/50GB Warn/Error thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'free')::int8 AS free_space
  FROM psutil_disk
 WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
   AND tag_data->>'dir_or_tablespace' = 'data_directory'
 ORDER BY 1 desc
 LIMIT 1

spec.title: DB size (last)
spec.description: Size for selected DB only

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'size_b')::int8 AS size
FROM db_size
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: Checkpoints requested
spec.description: Checkpoints should normally be performed by the background "Checkpointer" process. If seeing high numbers then adjusting server configuration is recommended.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT coalesce(sum(req - req_lag), 0) AS requested_cnt
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'checkpoints_req')::int as req,
               lag((data->>'checkpoints_req')::int) OVER(ORDER BY time) AS req_lag
          FROM bgwriter
         WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
           AND dbname = '$dbname'
       ) x
 WHERE req > req_lag

spec.title: Approx. table bloat
spec.description: Estimated extra space held by tables (excluding indexes) that would disappear after "compacting".

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  (data->>'approx_table_bloat_b')::int8 AS bloat
FROM
  table_bloat_approx_summary_sql
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: Instance role
spec.description: PRIMARY - accepting writes, REPLICA - read-only

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'in_recovery_int')::int
FROM wal
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: FIXME in case #1446 gets merged Invalid / duplicate indexes
spec.description:
Invalid indexes should be dropped as they're updated during DML operations but cannot be used to speed up queries. 

In case multiple indexes of the same structure, Postgres will use the smallest, so the others can be dropped. 

'N/A' is displayed both when there are no Invalid/duplicate indexes or no metrics data for recommendations.

Requires `reco_drop_index` metric.

spec.rawSql:
WITH q_invalid AS (
  select count(*) as cnt
  from recommendations
  where
  time = (
    select max(time) from recommendations 
    where $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname' AND 
      tag_data->>'reco_topic' = 'drop_index' AND tag_data->>'issue_type' = 'invalid'
  )
  AND dbname = '$dbname' AND tag_data->>'reco_topic' = 'drop_index' AND tag_data->>'issue_type' = 'invalid'
)
SELECT
  sum((data->>'duplicate_count')::int8) + (select cnt from q_invalid)::int8
FROM
  recommendations
WHERE
  time = (
    select max(time) from recommendations
    where $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname' AND 
      tag_data->>'reco_topic' = 'drop_index' AND tag_data->>'issue_type' = 'duplicate'
  )
  AND dbname = '$dbname' AND tag_data->>'reco_topic' = 'drop_index' AND tag_data->>'issue_type' = 'duplicate'

spec.title: Autovacuum issues
spec.description: Autovacuum disabled globally or per table.  This can lead to stale statistics or bloated tables, both adversely affecting performance.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT 0 as time,
       sum(count) AS issues_count
FROM (
      SELECT count
        FROM (
              SELECT CASE WHEN data->>'autovacuum' = 'off' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS count
                FROM settings
               WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
                 AND time > now() - '1d'::interval
               ORDER BY time DESC
               LIMIT 1
              ) AS s
 
      UNION ALL

      SELECT count(*)
        FROM table_stats
       WHERE dbname = '$dbname'
         AND time = (SELECT max(time) FROM table_stats WHERE dbname = '$dbname')
         AND (data->>'no_autovacuum')::int = 1
 ) x;

SELECT max((data->>'longest_query_seconds')::numeric)
  FROM backends
 WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: "Idle in TX" count
spec.description: Transactions opened but where no queries are being executed.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT max((data->>'idleintransaction')::int) AS idle_in_tx
  FROM backends
 WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: Blocked sessions
spec.description: Max number of queries waiting on resources locked by other sessions.  1 Warn / 5 Err thresholds by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT max((data->>'waiting')::int) AS waiting_cnt
FROM backends
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: Longest autovacuum run
spec.description: Long running autovacuum processes can hint at workload or configuration  problems

spec.title: WAL bytes/s (avg.)
spec.description: Transaction logs generation velocity.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg((wal - wal_lag) / (etime - lag_etime)) AS wal_rate
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'xlog_location_b')::int8 AS wal, 
               lag((data->>'xlog_location_b')::int8) OVER w AS wal_lag,
               extract(epoch from time) AS etime,
               lag(extract(epoch from time)) OVER w AS lag_etime,
               time
          FROM wal
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) x
WHERE wal >= wal_lag AND etime > lag_etime

spec.title: Temp. bytes/s (avg.)
spec.description: Postgres writes temporary files to disk when sorting / grouping  big amounts of data that doesn't fit into "work_mem".  10/100 MB Warn / Error by default

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg(CASE WHEN tb - tb_lag > 0 THEN (tb - tb_lag) / (etime - lag_etime) ELSE 0 END) AS temp_bytes_per_hour
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'temp_bytes')::int8 AS tb, lag((data->>'temp_bytes')::int8) OVER w AS tb_lag,
               (extract(epoch from time))::int8 AS etime,
               (lag(extract(epoch from time)) OVER w)::int8 AS lag_etime
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) x
 WHERE tb >= tb_lag AND etime > lag_etime

spec.title: Seq. scans on >100 MB tables per minute (avg.)
spec.description: Frequent sequential scans on bigger tables should usually be avoided. Warn / Error thresholds: 10 / 100

spec.rawSql:
SELECT sum((scan - scan_lag) * 60 / extract(epoch FROM (time - time_lag))) AS scan_count
  FROM (
        SELECT time, 
               lag(time) OVER w AS time_lag,
               (data->>'seq_scan')::int8 AS scan, 
               lag((data->>'seq_scan')::int8) OVER w AS scan_lag
          FROM table_stats
         WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
           AND dbname = '$dbname'
           AND (data->>'table_size_b')::int8 > 100000000
        WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY tag_data->>'table_full_name' ORDER BY time)
       ) x
WHERE scan > scan_lag AND time > time_lag

spec.title: Inactive repl. slots
spec.description: Inactive replication slots accumulate WAL files, potentially until disk space runs out. Re-animate the replica or use  pg_drop_replication_slot() to remove the slot so that Postgres can delete the unneeded WALs.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT sum((data->>'non_active_int')::int) AS slot_count
  FROM replication_slots
 WHERE time = (SELECT max(time) FROM replication_slots WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname')
   AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: Backup running since
spec.description: Based on pg_backup_start_time() [9.3+] function. N/A if no backup in progress.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  max((data->>'backup_duration_s')::int8) AS backup_duration
FROM
  db_stats
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  and dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: Oldest TX age
spec.description: In TX count, both from sessions and replication slots. Holds back vacuum.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT max(xmin) AS max_xmin
FROM (
    SELECT max((data->>'xmin_age_tx')::int8) AS xmin
      FROM replication_slots
     WHERE time = (SELECT max(time) 
                     FROM replication_slots
                    WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
                      AND dbname = '$dbname')
       AND dbname = '$dbname'  

    UNION ALL

    SELECT max((data->>'max_xmin_age_tx')::int8) AS xmin
      FROM backends
     WHERE time = (SELECT max(time)
                     FROM backends
                    WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
                      AND dbname = '$dbname')
       AND dbname = '$dbname'
) x

spec.title: PG version
spec.description:
"SHOW server_version_num;"
110005 => 11.5

spec.rawSql:
select split_part(data->>'server_version'::text, ' ',  1) as server_version
from settings 
where dbname = '$dbname' and $__timeFilter(time) 
order by time 
desc limit 1;

WITH s(max_connections) AS (
  SELECT (data->>'max_connections')::int
  FROM settings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND dbname = '$dbname'
  ORDER BY time DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT round(((b.data->>'numbackends')::float / s.max_connections) * 100) AS conn_used_pct, max_connections
FROM db_stats b, s
WHERE $__timeFilter(b.time) AND b.dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY b.time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: Max. replication lag
spec.description: "Apply" (data made visible to queries on replica)  lag in bytes

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  max((data->>'replay_lag_b')::int8) AS replay_lag
FROM
  replication
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'

spec.title: Max. table FREEZE age
spec.description: Max. age since last VACUUM FREEZE. Could hint at problems when going into 100s of millions

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  max((data->>'tx_freeze_age')::int8) AS tx_freeze_age
FROM
  table_stats
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time)
  and dbname = '$dbname'

options.content: ### The preset threshold values (green / yellow / red) should be reviewed / adjusted!

spec.title: Established connections (total)
spec.description: Total number of sessions established to this database during the interval set in the dashboard

spec.rawSql:
SELECT max((data->>'sessions')::int8) - min((data->>'sessions')::int8) AS established
  FROM db_stats 
 WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time) 
 ORDER BY 1

spec.title: JIT %
spec.description: Percentage of total query execution time spent in JIT (requires stat_statements_jit metric)

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (sum(total_jit - total_jit_lag) / sum(total_time - total_time_lag)) * 100 AS pct
  FROM
      (
          SELECT time,
                 (data->>'jit_generation_time')::float8 AS total_jit, 
                 lag((data->>'jit_generation_time')::float8) OVER w AS total_jit_lag,
                 (data->>'total_time')::float8 AS total_time, 
                 lag((data->>'total_time')::float8) OVER w AS total_time_lag
            FROM stat_statements
           WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
          WINDOW W AS (ORDER BY time)
      )
 WHERE total_time > total_time_lag

spec.title: Total index size
spec.description: Total size of user indexes for the selected DB. requires db_size metric.

spec.rawSql:
SELECT (data->>'indexes_size_b')::int8
FROM db_size
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND dbname = '$dbname'
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: TPS (avg.)
spec.description: Transactions per second

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg(((roll - roll_lag) + (comm - comm_lag)) / extract(epoch FROM (time - time_lag))) AS tps
  FROM (
        SELECT time, 
               lag(time) OVER w AS time_lag,
               (data->>'xact_rollback')::int8 AS roll, 
               lag((data->>'xact_rollback')::int8) OVER w AS roll_lag,
               (data->>'xact_commit')::int8 AS comm, 
               lag((data->>'xact_commit')::int8) OVER w AS comm_lag
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
           AND dbname = '$dbname'
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
      ) x
WHERE (comm > comm_lag OR roll > roll_lag) AND time > time_lag

SELECT (last_value - first_value) / first_value::numeric * 100 AS size_diff_pct
  FROM (
      SELECT first_value((data->>'size_b')::int8) OVER w,
             last_value((data->>'size_b')::int8) OVER w
        FROM db_size
       WHERE dbname = '$dbname' and $__timeFilter(time)
      WINDOW w AS (
         ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
       )
) x
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT last_value - first_value AS size_diff
  FROM (
      SELECT first_value((data->>'size_b')::int8) OVER w,
             last_value((data->>'size_b')::int8) OVER w
        FROM db_size
       WHERE dbname = '$dbname' and $__timeFilter(time)
      WINDOW w AS (
         ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
       )
) x
ORDER BY 1 DESC
LIMIT 1

spec.title: INSERT/min (avg.)
spec.description: On non-temporary  tables

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg(((ins - ins_lag) * 60) / extract(epoch FROM time - time_lag)) AS ins_per_min
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'tup_inserted')::int8 AS ins, 
               lag((data->>'tup_inserted')::int8) OVER w AS ins_lag,
               time, 
               lag(time) OVER w AS time_lag
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) AS x
 WHERE ins >= ins_lag AND time > time_lag

spec.title: UPDATE/min (avg.)
spec.description: On non-temporary  tables

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg(((upd - upd_lag) * 60) / extract(epoch FROM time - time_lag)) AS upd_per_min
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'tup_updated')::int8 AS upd, 
               lag((data->>'tup_updated')::int8) OVER w AS upd_lag,
               time, 
               lag(time) OVER w AS time_lag
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) AS x
 WHERE upd >= upd_lag AND time > time_lag

spec.title: DELETE/min (avg.)pd
spec.description: On non-temporary  tables

spec.rawSql:
SELECT avg(((del - del_lag) * 60) / extract(epoch FROM time - time_lag)) AS del_per_min
  FROM (
        SELECT (data->>'tup_deleted')::int8 AS del, 
               lag((data->>'tup_deleted')::int8) OVER w AS del_lag,
               time, 
               lag(time) OVER w AS time_lag
          FROM db_stats
         WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time)
        WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY time)
       ) AS x
 WHERE del >= del_lag AND time > time_lag

SELECT max((data->>'numbackends')) AS max_conn_count
  FROM db_stats 
 WHERE dbname = '$dbname' AND $__timeFilter(time) 
 ORDER BY 1

spec.title: 0. Health Check

spec.name: dbname
spec.label: Source Name

spec.query: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM admin.all_distinct_dbname_metrics ORDER BY 1;
spec.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM admin.all_distinct_dbname_metrics ORDER BY 1;

spec.definition: SELECT DISTINCT dbname FROM admin.all_distinct_dbname_metrics ORDER BY 1;
